verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I came to Jesus I settled it all I gave Him my life to control Neither fear nor persuasion, could draw me to Christ But His love has captured my soul.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m a prisoner of love I'm a slave to my Master I willingly toil through the heat and the cold; I seek no reward in this world below But the pay day will come, Oh Yes! When the pearly gates unfold.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He holds me secure with His love strong and true I'm happy His servant to be If bondaged to Jesus forever I’ll stay My soul doesn't want to be free.
